title: Workhorse Group Reports Full Year 2024 Results
text:
Workhorse Group Full Year 2024 Financial Results

Report Date: March 31, 2025

Key Financial Metrics

Sales, net: $6.6M (2024) vs. $13.1M (2023), Change: -$6.5M. Cost of sales: $28.2M vs. $38.4M, Change: -$9.5M. Gross loss: ($22.2M) vs. ($25.3M), Improved. SG&A expenses: $42.5M vs. $55.6M, Change: -$13.1M. R&D expenses: $9.1M vs. $24.5M, Change: -$15.3M. Net loss: ($101.8M) vs. ($123.9M), Improved.

Balance Sheet Summary (as of December 31, 2024)

Cash and equivalents: $4.1M. Total current assets: $53.4M. Total assets: $93.8M. Current liabilities: $45.2M. Stockholders' equity: $44.3M.

CEO Commentary

CEO Rick Dauch stated: We took a significant step forward last month when Transport Canada approved our W4 CC and W56 models for sale in Canada. He emphasized efforts to expand the EV portfolio and secure new customer orders while managing cash carefully.

Notable Business Developments

Transport Canada approval for W4 CC and W56 models. GSA contract awarded in November 2024. W56 208-inch wheelbase launched with 1,200 cubic feet cargo capacity. $35M convertible note financing in February 2025. 1-for-12.5 reverse stock split executed March 17, 2025.
